title: haplopappus detonsus
intro: Haplopappus detonsus, also known as Rock Mat Plant or Rock Tansy, is a flowering plant species native to the western United States. It is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Haplopappus detonsus include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe skin conditions, and aid in the healing of wounds. Haplopappus detonsus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves for topical application.
